caption: A man wearing a white shirt, a red bow tie, suspenders, and glasses sits in a studio setting. He is wearing a novelty grey wig that resembles a stylized crest and has black headphones over his ears. He sits before a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, several framed photographs and some clothing items, including a garment with the word "LEE" visible, are displayed on the wall. Two red and white logos featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" appear on the screen. Across the sequence, the man remains mostly stationary, though his facial expression shifts slightly, and he briefly moves his right hand in the early part of the clip before settling into a more still posture with his arms crossed.
